title: Relationship ...
content:
It's not really easy trying to start a relationship, think so? Not only you have to study the person you're trying to get to know. You also have to look back at yourself -- keep asking the  **what**  and the  **why** -questions from time to time.

Yes, I'm trying to get into a relationship with someone (don't guess, you'll be wrong - also, don't SAY ANY NAME). I'm certain that I would like to persue this relationship with that person. I'm just  **confused** . About what? I don't know. Mabbe I'm just ... doing too much thinking!

Anyway, I'm positive that I'm doing the right thing. (Right person or not, only time can tell...)

[red]Mabbe I should go find  **What Women Want**  and study it! :p[/red]

PS1. Yes, programmers always put logic to good use  **most of the time** . However, love doesn't abide by logic - eventhough it will end up in binary (yes or no / 0 or 1) everytime! :)

PS2.  **ความหวังใหม่ no more**  ครับ ลงมติ "ยุบ" รวมเป็นเมียน้อยไทยรักไทยไปเรียบร้อยแล้ว ดีครับ ความชัดเจนเกิดขึ้นมาอีก ว่าใครเป็นใคร ...
